description: Format Makefiles (Makefile, GNUmakefile, *.mk) with comprehensive code formatting options
configuration.title: Ark Format: Makefile
config.enabled.description: Enable Ark Format for Makefile files
config.effectLanguages.description: Language IDs for which the formatter is active (e.g. 'makefile')
config.indentConditionals.description: Indent the body of conditional blocks (ifeq/ifneq/ifdef/ifndef ... else ... endif) using spaces. TAB is never used: it has its own meaning in Makefiles (recipe prefix)
config.normalizeRecipePrefix.description: Convert recipe lines mistakenly indented with spaces to the mandatory TAB prefix (only when the line cannot be parsed as Makefile syntax)
config.alignAssignments.description: Vertically align assignment operators (=, :=, ::=, ?=, +=, !=) within contiguous blocks of variable assignments, padding with spaces (never TAB). Off by default: alignment causes diff churn when a longer variable name is added to a block
config.indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indentation level for conditional blocks
config.lineEnding.description: Line ending style (LF, CRLF, or Auto to preserve original)
config.trimTrailingWhitespace.descriptio: Remove trailing whitespace from lines (define blocks are always preserved verbatim)
config.maxConsecutiveBlankLines.descript: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines allowed
config.removeLeadingBlankLines.descripti: Remove blank lines at the beginning of the file
config.insertFinalNewline.description: Ensure file ends with a newline
config.collapseSpaces.description: Collapse multiple spaces into one (never applied to recipes, comments, assignment values or define blocks)
config.spacing.spaceAroundAssignment.des: Ensure a single space around assignment operators (=, :=, ::=, ?=, +=, !=)
config.spacing.spaceAfterTargetColon.des: Ensure a single space after ':' in target declarations (and none before)
config.spacing.spaceAfterCommentMarker.d: Ensure a space between the comment marker (#) and the comment text
config.rangeFormatting.reindent.descript: Re-indent selected range (uses document context to calculate the base conditional depth)
config.rangeFormatting.useDocumentContex: When re-indenting a range, pre-scan lines before the selection to compute the correct base conditional depth
